data.title: FLOKI's price poised for consolidation as technicals show mixed signals: RSI at 47.55 and bearish MACD hint limited upside.
data.description: The cryptocurrency FLOKI is currently displaying a combination of technical indicators. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) sits at a neutral level of 47.55, indicating no strong buying or selling pressure. However, the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) shows a bearish momentum trend. These signals imply that FLOKI may experience consolidation around its present price, with minimal potential for immediate upward movement.

data.title: 'Miracle of Life' Dr. George Delgado Joins Aureum Therapeutics, Inc. in Pioneering Transformative and Life-Saving Treatments
data.description: A biotechnology company in San Diego, Aureum Therapeutics, Inc., is delving into the complex mechanisms of pregnancy to create innovative treatments for cancer and recurrent miscarriage. This clinical-stage company aims to utilize the knowledge gained from pregnancy research to develop groundbreaking solutions. The initiative is set to have a significant impact on addressing these health challenges. The date to remember is March 20, 2026.

data.title: Orfeó Català Lent Concert at Sagrada Família Commemorates Gaudí Cornerstone Anniversary
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain, on March 19, 2026, the Sagrada Família commemorated a significant moment with a special performance honoring the longstanding choral heritage intertwined with Antoni Gaudí's spiritual ideals. The Basilica showcased a moving concert in celebration of Lent, highlighting the enduring link between music and Gaudí's visionary legacy. This event marked a notable occasion in the Basilica's history, underscoring its profound cultural importance.

data.title: JCP&L Encourages Customers to Explore Energy Bill Assistance Options
data.description: On April 22, a company will be organizing an assistance event in Ocean County to address the impact of seasonal temperature changes on energy consumption. Following the conclusion of the New Jersey Winter Termination Program, Jersey Central Power & Light (JCP&L) is stepping in to help residents manage their energy expenses. This initiative comes as a response to the rise in energy use during temperature shifts, which often results in increased utility bills for consumers in the region.

data.title: CRV aims $0.26 breakout by April 2026. Price now at $0.23 with RSI 43.28. Potential uptrend if surpassing $0.25, support at $0.22.
data.description: The CRV is currently trading at a price of $0.23 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 43.28. Analysts using technical analysis predict a potential breakout above the resistance level of $0.25, which could lead to a target price of $0.26 by April. The support level is observed at $0.22.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Sinks Below Key Level As War Stokes Volatility, Adobe Plunges (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decrease following unexpected inflation and GDP figures. Adobe stock saw a significant drop in value after reporting its earnings. The Nasdaq also took a hit, falling below a crucial level, as heightened volatility due to ongoing conflicts impacted the market. This update was provided by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: YY Group (NASDAQ: YYGH) Projects FY2026 Revenue Exceeding US$103 Million, Issues First Formal Guidance
data.description: YY Group, listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker YYGH, has released its initial revenue forecast for the fiscal year 2026. The company anticipates a revenue range of $103 million to $110 million. This projection is attributed to the impact of recent acquisitions, growing global workforce needs, and the expansion of its Integrated Facilities Management (IFM) services.

data.title: TURBO ENERGY ANNOUNCES $3.25 MILLION REGISTERED DIRECT OFFERING WITH A SINGLE GLOBAL INSTITUTIONAL INVESTOR
data.description: Valencia, Spain - March 12, 2026 - Turbo Energy, S.A. (Nasdaq: TURB), a leading global provider of AI-optimized solar energy storage technologies, has recently finalized a securities purchase agreement with a single global institutional investor. The agreement includes the purchase and sale of 1,000,000 of the Company’s American Depositary Shares (ADSs) at a rate of $3.25 per ADS in a registered direct offering. The transaction is anticipated to generate gross proceeds of around $3.25 million, excluding placement agent commissions and additional offering expenses. The closure of this offering is projected to take place on or around March 13, 2026, pending the fulfillment of standard closing conditions.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump's Iran Comments Spark Stock Market Reversal As Oil Prices Tumble
data.description: On Monday, President Trump's remarks regarding Iran led to a reversal in the stock market, particularly impacting Dow Jones Futures. This triggered a decrease in oil prices, causing significant fluctuations in the market. The sudden change resulted in a negative trend in stock trading, with Dow Jones Futures being notably affected. The volatility in the market was evident as oil prices saw a sudden drop.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Gains As Trump Says Iran War Is 'Very Complete'; Cruise Stock Soars (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a rebound on the stock market after initially dropping. Oil prices saw a significant increase due to rising tensions between the U.S. and Iran. Nvidia performed exceptionally well, and Hims also saw significant gains. The stock market today saw the Dow Jones gaining ground, following remarks from Trump indicating that the conflict with Iran has reached a conclusion. Additionally, cruise stock experienced a sharp surge.

data.title: Share Buyback Transaction Details March 5 – March 11, 2026
data.description: Today, Wolters Kluwer announced the repurchase of a total of 101,978 of its own ordinary shares within the timeframe spanning from March 5, 2026, to March 11, 2026.

data.title: HelloNation Article Explains Hail Damage Coverage and Deductible Basics With Insurance Expert Ben Buenzow
data.description: In Urbandale, Iowa on March 20, 2026, a recent article delves into the impact of hail damage, deductibles, and policy coverage on insurance claims for homeowners in central Iowa. The discussion highlights important factors that homeowners should grasp regarding hail damage coverage and deductibles prior to the arrival of the next storm.

data.title: Dozens of employees were let go as CBS News reduces staff by 6%, under the new leadership of Bari Weiss.
data.description: Several dozen employees at the news division, owned by technology heir David Ellison, were impacted by the recent layoffs. The exact number of employees affected has not been disclosed.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Managers' transactions - Arkilahti
data.description: On March 20, 2026, in Helsinki, Finland, Nordea Bank Abp disclosed a stock exchange release about Managers' transactions. As per the notification received, Nina Arkilahti, a member of the Nordea Group Leadership Team, acquired a total of 26,289 shares in Nordea Bank Abp.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Managers' transactions - Kandborg
data.description: On March 20, 2026, Nordea Bank Abp issued a stock exchange release regarding Managers' transactions at 16.00 EET. Mark Kandborg, a member of the Nordea Group Leadership Team, acquired a total of 9,123 shares in Nordea Bank Abp. This information was disclosed following a notification received under the Market regulations.

data.title: Tesla Talking To Chinese Suppliers For Elon Musk's Solar Project: Report
data.description: A solar project by Tesla is underway with the goal of generating 100 gigawatts of solar cells. Tesla's stock has fallen to six-month lows, with continued weekly losses. Reports suggest that Tesla is in discussions with Chinese suppliers for Elon Musk's solar venture.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Managers' transactions - Renner
data.description: On March 20, 2026, in Helsinki, Finland, Kirsten Renner, a member of the Nordea Group Leadership Team, has acquired a total of 10,067 shares in Nordea Bank Abp. This acquisition was disclosed in compliance with the Market Abuse Regulation, under Article 19 of the EU Market rules.
